FAIL
Findings:
- id: R001
  severity: high
  location: 07-plan.md#step-4
  issue: Step 4 caps link requests per address — an observable acceptance behavior that 06-spec.md never states as a criterion.
  why_it_matters: The plan executes acceptance behavior with no spec backing, so the implementation can drift from intended behavior and there is no criterion to verify against.
  suggested_fix: Add a rate-limit acceptance criterion to 06-spec.md, then reference it from 07-plan.md step 4.
  confidence: confirmed
  sensitive: false
